_comment: Single source of truth for FOMC external-communications blackout periods. Read by .github/workflows/collect.yml and the cloud scoring routine. A date d (YYYY-MM-DD) is in blackout when, for any period, start <= d <= end (ISO strings compare chronologically). Per Fed policy, the blackout begins 12:00am ET the second Saturday before an FOMC meeting and ends 11:59pm ET the day after the meeting ends. Update from the official PDF each year.
_sep_comment: "sep": true marks a PROJECTION meeting — one that releases a Summary of Economic Projections / dot plot (Type I). The SEP is released only EVERY OTHER meeting (4 of the 8 per year). On a flagged meeting the 2:05pm FOMC-statement run also pulls the projection table and writes the Type I diff vs. the PRIOR projection meeting (two meetings back). Do not hardcode SEP month names anywhere else — read this flag.
